name: G-Resources Group Limited
summary: G-Resources Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the principal investment, financial services, and real property businesses. The company is involved in the provision of various financial services, including securities brokerage services, placing and underwriting services, corporate finance advisory services, provision of margin financing, money lending business, investment advisory and management services, and asset management services, as well as securities investment business. It also provides trust and company services; and fund investment services. The company operates in Singapore, Hong Kong, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Smart Rich Energy Finance (Holdings) Limited and changed its name to G-Resources Group Limited in June 2009. G-Resources Group Limited is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
